otherRequirements: A visa is normally required; apply for a tourist e-visa online before travel (valid up to 3 months) or buy a visa on arrival ($30 cash) at approved airports
If arriving by air to Sharm El-Sheikh and staying under 15 days within the Sharm/Dahab/Nuweiba/Taba resort area you get a free entry-permission stamp instead
Passport must be valid for at least 6 months from your date of arrival
sourceNote: gov.uk Egypt travel advice — visa required; tourist e-visa valid up to 3 months, or visa on arrival; Sinai resort exemption under 15 days (https://www.gov.uk/foreign-travel-advice/egypt/entry-requirements)
